## Meeting Purpose

[Introduce new Homebase team members to GrowthX and discuss ongoing content/SEO collaboration.](https://fathom.video/share/Rg4yYReaNdxo5QV-NLALuLa2YTD6Bqrg?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [GrowthX has grown to 70 employees and developed sophisticated AI-powered content workflows](https://fathom.video/share/Rg4yYReaNdxo5QV-NLALuLa2YTD6Bqrg?tab=summary&timestamp=494.0)
  - [Homebase's glossary project is performing well (8,000 keywords in 1.5 months)](https://fathom.video/share/Rg4yYReaNdxo5QV-NLALuLa2YTD6Bqrg?tab=summary&timestamp=85.0)
  - [Next steps include refining brand voice in content, exploring podcast/Reddit scraping, and improving GrowthX's branding prompt](https://fathom.video/share/Rg4yYReaNdxo5QV-NLALuLa2YTD6Bqrg?tab=summary&timestamp=1425.0)

## Topics

### Team Introductions

  - [Homebase: Kerry (organic team lead), Mark (technical SEO, 2nd month), Sonia (senior content strategist, 10+ years B2B experience)](https://fathom.video/share/Rg4yYReaNdxo5QV-NLALuLa2YTD6Bqrg?tab=summary&timestamp=57.0)
  - [GrowthX: Marcel (CEO), Branko (managing director), Jess (managing editor for Homebase)](https://fathom.video/share/Rg4yYReaNdxo5QV-NLALuLa2YTD6Bqrg?tab=summary&timestamp=276.0)

### GrowthX Platform Overview

  - [Developed code-based workflows for content creation (500,000+ workflow runs last month)](https://fathom.video/share/Rg4yYReaNdxo5QV-NLALuLa2YTD6Bqrg?tab=summary&timestamp=809.0)
  - [Uses multiple APIs (GPT, Perplexity) for deep research and content generation](https://fathom.video/share/Rg4yYReaNdxo5QV-NLALuLa2YTD6Bqrg?tab=summary&timestamp=941.0)
  - [Building internal "content OS" platform to continuously learn and improve processes](https://fathom.video/share/Rg4yYReaNdxo5QV-NLALuLa2YTD6Bqrg?tab=summary&timestamp=815.0)

### Homebase Glossary Project Update

  - [207 pages live, 15 in production, 35 ready to go](https://fathom.video/share/Rg4yYReaNdxo5QV-NLALuLa2YTD6Bqrg?tab=summary&timestamp=36.0)
  - [Waiting on template updates from Mark before publishing next batch](https://fathom.video/share/Rg4yYReaNdxo5QV-NLALuLa2YTD6Bqrg?tab=summary&timestamp=95.0)
  - [Considering adding glossary to main navigation to boost traffic](https://fathom.video/share/Rg4yYReaNdxo5QV-NLALuLa2YTD6Bqrg?tab=summary&timestamp=1836.0)

### Content Recalibrations

  - [Provided two versions of recalibrated content: concise vs. more personality-driven](https://fathom.video/share/Rg4yYReaNdxo5QV-NLALuLa2YTD6Bqrg?tab=summary&timestamp=1887.0)
  - [Swapped to Claude LLM, seeing improvements but still refining brand voice](https://fathom.video/share/Rg4yYReaNdxo5QV-NLALuLa2YTD6Bqrg?tab=summary&timestamp=2037.0)
  - [Need to revisit baseline branding information fed into AI system](https://fathom.video/share/Rg4yYReaNdxo5QV-NLALuLa2YTD6Bqrg?tab=summary&timestamp=2086.0)

### Next Steps for Content Collaboration

  - [Sonia to review/revise GrowthX's branding prompt](https://fathom.video/share/Rg4yYReaNdxo5QV-NLALuLa2YTD6Bqrg?tab=summary&timestamp=2107.0)
  - [Test using direct copy from Homebase brand guide for improved results](https://fathom.video/share/Rg4yYReaNdxo5QV-NLALuLa2YTD6Bqrg?tab=summary&timestamp=2156.0)
  - [Jess to provide Reddit scraping and podcast repurposing samples next call](https://fathom.video/share/Rg4yYReaNdxo5QV-NLALuLa2YTD6Bqrg?tab=summary&timestamp=2294.0)
